zh.lifeSummary: 當Julia MacCarthy於1506年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克時，她的父親Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry59歲，母親Catherine Barry50歲。她於大約1540年與Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry結婚。她去世於1585年在她的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julia MacCarthy于1506年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克时，她的父亲Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry59岁，母亲Catherine Barry50岁。她于大约1540年与Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry结婚。她去世于1585年在她的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Julia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name   Julius .  A woman called Julia is mentioned in Paul's Epistle to the Romans (Romans 16:15), and the name was borne by numerous early saints. Its frequency increased with the vogue for classical names in the 18th century, and it continues to enjoy considerable popularity, although the recent introduction of   Julie   to the English-speaking world has reduced this somewhat. Well-known bearers include the British actress  Julia Foster  (  b. 1941 ) and American actress  Julia Roberts  (  b. 1967  as  Julie Fiona Roberts ).

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Julia MacCarthy was born in 1506, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, her father, Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry, was 59 and her mother, Catherine Barry, was 50. She married Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry about 1540. She died in 1585, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julia MacCarthy est née en 1506, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Catherine Barry, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry environ 1540. Elle est décédée en 1585, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julia MacCarthy 1506 in Cork, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry 59 und ihre Mutter Catherine Barry 50. Sie hat um 1540 Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry geheiratet. Sie starb 1585 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julia MacCarthy è nata il nel 1506 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, sua padre, Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Catherine Barry, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry circa 1540. Morì nel 1585, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Julia MacCarthyが1506年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで生まれた時，父Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerryは59歳，母Catherine Barryは50歳であった。約1540年にGerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerryと結婚した。彼女は1585年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julia MacCarthy(이)가 1506년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Barry(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 대략 1540년 Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1585년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julia MacCarthy nasceu em 1506, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Barry, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry aproximadamente 1540. Ela faleceu em 1585, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julia MacCarthy родилась в 1506 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Barry, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry около 1540 г. Она умерла в 1585 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Julia MacCarthy nació en 1506, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Cormac MacCarthy 10th Lord of Muskerry, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Catherine Barry, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Gerard FitzMaurice 15th Baron of Kerry aproximadamente 1540. Murió en 1585, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
